suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document canonical payroll liability account conventions (PF-PAYABLE, ESI-PAYABLE, TDS-PAYABLE, PROFESSIONAL-TAX-PAYABLE) used by payroll posting and invariant datasets so future feature work/tests rely on stable account codes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-module-integration-hardening review observed payroll flows and invariants seed/expect these exact account codes, but current architecture guidance does not capture them.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document supplier lifecycle canonical status values and migration normalization expectations (PENDING, APPROVED, ACTIVE, SUSPENDED; PO status normalization) to avoid cross-feature drift in status semantics.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-module-integration-hardening review found migration_v2 V29 normalizes legacy supplier/PO statuses and enforces constraints, but these canonical states are not documented in worker guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance branch for stabilization/parity features where the correct sequence is diagnose failing baseline/integration tests first, then patch and backfill assertions, instead of strict greenfield TDD ordering.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-module-integration-hardening reviewer noted reasonable deviation from Step 2 TDD because task scope was schema/runtime parity hardening of existing failing invariants.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether parallel/overlapping tenant-management endpoint families are intentional and designate the frontend-preferred canonical route set (/api/v1/superadmin/* vs /api/v1/companies/superadmin/*) to prevent frontend contract ambiguity.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: auth-tenant-admin-frontend-handoff-doc review observed overlapping tenant lifecycle/management capabilities across SuperAdminController and CompanyController; docs only cover one family.

rejectedObservations.reason: already-known and already reflected by existing deferred feature misc-deferred-validation-fixes and prior validation state (VAL-ACCT-001/VAL-FOUND-003 style structural follow-up), so not added as new guidance change here

rejectedObservations.observation: Balance sheet account-type heuristic string matching may be fragile.
rejectedObservations.reason: implementation-specific design note; not yet a cross-project guidance update candidate without broader schema decision

rejectedObservations.observation: AdminSettingsController and secondary CompanyController support endpoints are undocumented in frontend-handoff.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: feature-scope non-blocking doc gap, but does not require shared-state infrastructure update; should be handled as future docs feature if needed

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill phrasing around frontend-handoff update requirement is unclear.
rejectedObservations.reason: review evidence indicates current skill already conditions docs updates on endpoint changes; ambiguity appears worker-local rather than systemic wording defect

rejectedObservations.observation: CashFlowDto omission and partial secondary DTO field expansions in reports docs.
rejectedObservations.reason: documentation completeness improvements that are non-blocking and scoped to module docs, not shared operational state
